about.subtitle: We are a team of enthusiasts who love animals just as much as you do. Our goal is to make pet care simple, convenient, and tech-driven.

care.title: Care for Everyone
care.desc: We carefully select products, checking ingredients and quality.

quality.title: Quality Guarantee
quality.desc: We work only with trusted suppliers and brands.

delivery.title: Fast Delivery
delivery.desc: We deliver orders right to your door in the shortest possible time.

support.title: 24/7 Support
support.desc: Our AI vet and support team are always available.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: We believe every pet deserves the best. That's why we created PetStore AI — a place where advanced technology helps pet owners make the right choices. Our smart AI assistant analyzes your pet's needs and suggests only what truly suits them.
